name: Xenia Hotels & Resorts, Inc.
business: Xenia Hotels & Resorts, Inc. is a self-advised and self-administered REIT that invests primarily in uniquely positioned luxury and upper upscale hotels and resorts, focusing on the top 25 lodging markets and key leisure destinations in the United States. It does not operate hotels directly; instead, it leases properties to its taxable REIT subsidiary, which engages third-party management companies to operate the hotels. The company generates revenue from rooms, food and beverage, and other services, catering to transient business, group, and contract customers.

exposures.sentence: cyber incidents and information technology failures, including unauthorized access to our computer systems and/or our vendors' computer systems, and our third-party management companies' or franchisors' computer systems and/or their vendors' computer systems

catalysts.event: Repayment in full of $51.8 million mortgage loan on Grand Bohemian Hotel Orlando, Autograph Collection
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, the Company repaid in full with cash on hand the $51.8 million outstanding balance on the mortgage loan collateralized by Grand Bohemian Hotel Orlando, Autograph Collection.
